code:
stateDiagram-v2
playerCount: Ask how many players
establishBonusPoints: Establish the Zap and Bonus

[HealthTech_EMR_Sync] --> playerCount
playerCount --> establishBonusPoints

establishBonusPoints --> EstablishBust
state EstablishBust {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer] --> rollBust

	rollBust --> awardBustChoice

	awardBustChoice --> awardBustPoints: If exact match
	awardBustChoice --> offerHighRiskChoice: If not exact match

	offerHighRiskChoice --> offerHighRisk: If 2-6
	offerHighRiskChoice --> [HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]: If >= 7

	awardBustPoints --> offerHighRiskChoice: If >= 7

	offerHighRisk --> highRiskChoice

	highRiskChoice --> [HealthTech_EMR_Sync]: If declined

}

EstablishBust --> PressLoop

state PressLoop {HealthTech_PatientRecords] --> rollPress
	rollPress --> rollPress: As many times as they want

	rollPress --> goBust: If matches Bust dice
	rollPress --> awardPoints: If chooses "Stop"
	rollPress --> evilOffer: If rolled 2x more than expected

	goBust --> nextPlayer
	awardPoints --> nextPlayer
	evilOffer --> evilOfferChoice
	evilOfferChoice --> rollEvilOffer: If accepted
	evilOfferChoice --> awardPoints: If rejected

	rollEvilOffer --> displayBustEvilOffer
	rollEvilOffer --> displayWinEvilOffer
	displayBustEvilOffer --> nextPlayer
	displayWinEvilOffer --> rollPress
	displayWinEvilOffer --> evilOffer
	displayWinEvilOffer --> awardPoints

	nextPlayer --> [HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault]
}

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个医疗科技主题的骰子游戏状态机。玩家从HealthTech_EMR_Sync开始，先询问玩家人数，然后建立Zap和Bonus机制。
明白了，所以流程是EMR同步后进入playerCount状态，然后到establishBonusPoints。接下来是进入EstablishBust这个复合状态吗？
对，EstablishBust内部从HealthTech_LabAnalyzer开始，先rollBust，然后到awardBustChoice。这里要分叉：精确匹配就awardBustPoints，不匹配就进入offerHighRiskChoice。
offerHighRiskChoice这里我设计两个分支：掷出2-6就进入offerHighRisk，等于7就跳转到HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault。另外awardBustPoints如果等于7也要回到offerHighRiskChoice，对吗？
没错。offerHighRisk之后到highRiskChoice，玩家拒绝的话就回到HealthTech_EMR_Sync。EstablishBust结束后进入PressLoop主循环。
PressLoop从HealthTech_PatientRecords开始，rollPress可以重复多次——玩家想掷多少次就多少次。如果匹配Bust骰子就goBust，选择停止就awardPoints，还有一种特殊情况是evilOffer。
evilOffer的触发条件是"掷出结果比预期大2倍以上"。evilOffer之后进入evilOfferChoice，接受就rollEvilOffer，拒绝就回到awardPoints。
rollEvilOffer之后分两支：displayBustEvilOffer直接到nextPlayer，displayWinEvilOffer有三个去向——可以回到rollPress继续、进入evilOffer循环、或者直接awardPoints结算。最后nextPlayer都汇聚到HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault。
